title: Comment from Association of Public Health Laboratories, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: APHL is pleased to submit the attached response to Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions To Unleash Prosperity. Should you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us. We would be happy to provide more information, or to discuss our recommendations with you.
